scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:example
scripts.check: npm run verify && npm run pack && npm run publish:dry-run
scripts.release:patch: npm run check && npm version patch --workspace @yadimon/ng-smart-images && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run check && npm version minor --workspace @yadimon/ng-smart-images && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm run check && npm version major --workspace @yadimon/ng-smart-images && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
